TestCase z15Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    if (follow_case_data != NULL && t1.n > 0) {
        memcpy(follow_case_data, t1.data, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    }
    follow_case.data = follow_case_data;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to sort, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Simple insertion sort implementation since std::sort is not allowed
    for (int i = 1; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        double key = follow_case.data[i];
        int j = i - 1;
        while (j >= 0 && follow_case.data[j] > key) {
            follow_case.data[j + 1] = follow_case.data[j];
            j--;
        }
        follow_case.data[j + 1] = key;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
